name: Block, Inc.
analysis: XYZ's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$106.8300. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$109.8800, stop A$93.6441, target A$158.5877 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
